Name: found files
Description: Introductory paperwork recovered from the narrative floor after the multiverse tripped over its own filing cabinet.

Name: welcome to the poppyverse
Description: Where it all begins. Your first step into this mess.

Name: deeper into the poppyverse
Description: Same multiverse branch, deeper layers, fewer safety rails.

Name: the red poppyverse
Description: Where the poppies blaze bright with purpose, and the petals fall faster than they should.

Name: the desert roseverse
Description: Endless sand, questionable hygiene, and even stranger things than the desert mirages.

Name: the ultravioletverse
Description: A universe where the badass you idolize offers you life advice that sounds suspiciously like HR warnings.

Name: the lilyverse
Description: Every other DONOR is a glitching, haunting, half-present entity. This one? Full commander bars, fully corporeal, fully capable of ending you with paperwork alone.

Name: the spider lilyverse
Description: Reincarnation, irony, second chances, and the universe’s terrible sense of humor.

Name: the fireweedverse
Description: Fireweed is a Poppyverse branch grown in the burn scar of Fire Force: spontaneous human combustion, Infernals, Company 8, and the terrible things that grow from bodies the fire did not finish.

Name: by the bay
Description: Bay Area stories where the rent is high, the fog is suspicious, and the tech industry is somehow still not the weirdest thing happening.

Name: do in dc
Description: A sightseeing tour through monuments, museums, and whatever classified nonsense followed everyone into the nation’s capital.

Name: houston, houston
Description: NASA, family ghosts, interdimensional aliens, and astronomical incidents large enough to make Mission Control consider unplugging the headset.

Name: counting sheep
Description: PILOT and DONOR grow old on a NorCal sheep farm, where peace is warm, woolly, and not even pretending the ram symbolism is subtle.

Name: area fifty-done
Description: Whatever happens in Area Fifty-Done stays in Area Fifty-Done!

Name: beyond the poppyverse
Description: Where the fourth wall gets thin and the author starts pacing.
